requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — NEECA Labelling (no EU-style minimum-efficacy gate)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——NEECA 能效标签（无欧盟式最低能效门槛）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——NEECA 能效標籤（無歐盟式最低能效門檻）

summary.en: Pakistan's energy-efficiency framework for appliances and lighting is led by NEECA (National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority), which operates a minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and energy-labelling programme. Where LED lighting products are brought within NEECA's covered-product scope, the importer/manufacturer must meet the applicable NEECA energy-efficiency requirement and display the NEECA star-rating energy label. Crucially, Pakistan does NOT operate an EU-Ecodesign-style binding minimum-efficacy regulation (EU Reg 2019/2020) that gates market access on lm/W, CRI, lifetime and power-factor thresholds across the board; NEECA's instrument is primarily a labelling/star-rating scheme (with MEPS where set per product category) rather than a comprehensive Ecodesign performance gate. Coverage of specific LED lamp/luminaire categories under NEECA has been phasing in — confirm the current NEECA covered-product list and label format for the specific product before shipment.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦针对电器及照明的能效框架由 NEECA（国家能效与节能局）主导，运行最低能效标准（MEPS）及能效标签计划。当 LED 照明产品被纳入 NEECA 涵盖产品范围时，进口商/制造商须满足适用的 NEECA 能效要求并加施 NEECA 星级能效标签。关键在于，巴基斯坦并未实施欧盟生态设计式、以 lm/W、显色指数、寿命及功率因数阈值全面把控市场准入的约束性最低能效法规（欧盟法规 2019/2020）；NEECA 的工具主要为标签/星级方案（在按产品类别设定时附 MEPS），而非全面的生态设计性能门槛。NEECA 对具体 LED 灯/灯具类别的涵盖正逐步推进——出货前请确认现行 NEECA 涵盖产品清单及具体产品的标签格式。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦針對電器及照明的能效框架由 NEECA（國家能效與節能局）主導，運行最低能效標準（MEPS）及能效標籤計劃。當 LED 照明產品被納入 NEECA 涵蓋產品範圍時，進口商/製造商須滿足適用的 NEECA 能效要求並加施 NEECA 星級能效標籤。關鍵在於，巴基斯坦並未實施歐盟生態設計式、以 lm/W、顯色指數、壽命及功率因數閾值全面把控市場准入的約束性最低能效法規（歐盟法規 2019/2020）；NEECA 的工具主要為標籤/星級方案（在按產品類別設定時附 MEPS），而非全面的生態設計性能門檻。NEECA 對具體 LED 燈/燈具類別的涵蓋正逐步推進——出貨前請確認現行 NEECA 涵蓋產品清單及具體產品的標籤格式。

standards_or_laws: NEECA Act 2016 — National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority mandate (MEPS and energy labelling for covered products)
NEECA energy-labelling / star-rating programme — applicable where the LED lighting category is within NEECA covered-product scope

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), defining three grades: Grade 1 ≥90 lm/W, Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W, Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum for market entry. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products, administered by SAMR (with CQC/CECP). GB 30255 combines a binding minimum-efficacy gate (Grade 3) with a mandatory efficiency-grade label — a stricter binding floor than a pure labelling scheme.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三级：1 级 ≥90 lm/W、2 级 ≥80 lm/W、3 级 ≥70 lm/W，3 级为市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由 SAMR（及 CQC/CECP）管理。GB 30255 将约束性最低能效门槛（3 级）与强制能效等级标签结合——比纯标签方案具有更严格的约束底线。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三級：1 級 ≥90 lm/W、2 級 ≥80 lm/W、3 級 ≥70 lm/W，3 級為市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由 SAMR（及 CQC/CECP）管理。GB 30255 將約束性最低能效門檻（3 級）與強制能效等級標籤結合——比純標籤方案具有更嚴格的約束底線。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: This is a structural difference. The EU-to-China lane contrasts the EU Ecodesign binding minimum-efficacy gate against China's GB 30255 grades; the China-to-Pakistan lane is different again — Pakistan does NOT have an EU-style comprehensive Ecodesign performance gate, and its energy instrument (NEECA) is primarily MEPS-plus-labelling where the product category is covered. Practical points for a Chinese exporter: (1) China already applies a binding efficacy floor (GB 30255 Grade 3, ≥70 lm/W) plus CEL labelling, so a CN-compliant product typically already meets a reasonable efficacy level — but the CN CEL label and NEECA star-rating label are different schemes and not mutually recognised; (2) where the LED category is within NEECA scope, the importer must register/qualify for and display the NEECA energy label, which is a separate step from CN CEL; (3) confirm the current NEECA covered-product list, because LED coverage and label thresholds have been phasing in and may differ from / not yet cover certain luminaire types. Do NOT assume the EU Ecodesign lm/W / CRI / lifetime / power-factor gate applies in Pakistan.
gap.zh: 这是结构性差异。欧盟出口中国通道对比欧盟生态设计约束性最低能效门槛与中国 GB 30255 等级；中国出口巴基斯坦通道又有不同——巴基斯坦没有欧盟式全面生态设计性能门槛，其能效工具（NEECA）在产品类别被涵盖时主要为 MEPS 加标签。中国出口商的实际要点：（1）中国已实施约束性能效底线（GB 30255 3 级，≥70 lm/W）加 CEL 标签，故符合中国标准的产品通常已达合理能效水平——但中国 CEL 标签与 NEECA 星级标签为不同方案且互不认可；（2）当 LED 类别在 NEECA 范围内时，进口商须注册/取得资格并加施 NEECA 能效标签，这是独立于中国 CEL 的步骤；（3）请确认现行 NEECA 涵盖产品清单，因为 LED 涵盖及标签阈值正逐步推进，可能与某些灯具类型不同或尚未涵盖。请勿假定欧盟生态设计 lm/W / 显色指数 / 寿命 / 功率因数门槛适用于巴基斯坦。
gap.zht: 這是結構性差異。歐盟出口中國通道對比歐盟生態設計約束性最低能效門檻與中國 GB 30255 等級；中國出口巴基斯坦通道又有不同——巴基斯坦沒有歐盟式全面生態設計性能門檻，其能效工具（NEECA）在產品類別被涵蓋時主要為 MEPS 加標籤。中國出口商的實際要點：（1）中國已實施約束性能效底線（GB 30255 3 級，≥70 lm/W）加 CEL 標籤，故符合中國標準的產品通常已達合理能效水平——但中國 CEL 標籤與 NEECA 星級標籤為不同方案且互不認可；（2）當 LED 類別在 NEECA 範圍內時，進口商須注冊/取得資格並加施 NEECA 能效標籤，這是獨立於中國 CEL 的步驟；（3）請確認現行 NEECA 涵蓋產品清單，因為 LED 涵蓋及標籤閾值正逐步推進，可能與某些燈具類型不同或尚未涵蓋。請勿假定歐盟生態設計 lm/W / 顯色指數 / 壽命 / 功率因數門檻適用於巴基斯坦。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — where the LED lighting category is within NEECA covered-product scope, the applicable NEECA energy-efficiency requirement (MEPS where set) and NEECA energy label apply. Pakistan has no EU-style comprehensive Ecodesign minimum-efficacy / CRI / lifetime / power-factor gate. Confirm the current NEECA covered-product list.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority (NEECA), Pakistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan's energy-efficiency requirement for LED lighting is driven by NEECA (MEPS-plus-labelling where the category is covered), NOT an EU-style comprehensive Ecodesign minimum-efficacy gate. A Chinese product already meeting GB 30255 (Grade 3 floor ≥70 lm/W) plus the CN Energy Label typically has a reasonable efficacy baseline, but the CN CEL and the NEECA star-rating label are separate, non-mutual schemes — where the LED category is within NEECA scope, the NEECA label is an additional step handled via the importer. Do not assume EU lm/W / CRI / lifetime / power-factor thresholds apply; confirm the current NEECA covered-product list and label format.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦对 LED 照明的能效要求由 NEECA 主导（在类别被涵盖时为 MEPS 加标签），而非欧盟式全面生态设计最低能效门槛。已符合 GB 30255（3 级底线 ≥70 lm/W）加中国能效标签的中国产品通常具有合理能效基线，但中国 CEL 与 NEECA 星级标签为独立、互不认可的方案——当 LED 类别在 NEECA 范围内时，NEECA 标签是经进口商办理的额外步骤。请勿假定欧盟 lm/W / 显色指数 / 寿命 / 功率因数阈值适用；请确认现行 NEECA 涵盖产品清单及标签格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦對 LED 照明的能效要求由 NEECA 主導（在類別被涵蓋時為 MEPS 加標籤），而非歐盟式全面生態設計最低能效門檻。已符合 GB 30255（3 級底線 ≥70 lm/W）加中國能效標籤的中國產品通常具有合理能效基線，但中國 CEL 與 NEECA 星級標籤為獨立、互不認可的方案——當 LED 類別在 NEECA 範圍內時，NEECA 標籤是經進口商辦理的額外步驟。請勿假定歐盟 lm/W / 顯色指數 / 壽命 / 功率因數閾值適用；請確認現行 NEECA 涵蓋產品清單及標籤格式。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label Display & Registration — NEECA label vs EU EPREL/A-G label
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签显示与注册——NEECA 标签 vs 欧盟 EPREL/A-G 标签
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤顯示與注冊——NEECA 標籤 vs 歐盟 EPREL/A-G 標籤

summary.en: Where an LED lighting product is within NEECA's covered-product scope, Pakistan requires display of the NEECA energy-efficiency label (a star-rating-style label) on the product/packaging, and registration/qualification of the model with NEECA as part of the labelling programme. Pakistan does NOT operate an EU-style EPREL public product database, and the NEECA label is a star-rating format rather than the EU rescaled A–G class derived from an Energy Efficiency Index (EEI). There is no EU-style legal requirement to display an A–G energy label on online product listings for the Pakistan market. The NEECA label content, star thresholds and registration mechanics are set by NEECA per covered product category — confirm the current format, thresholds and registration process for the specific LED category before shipment.
summary.zh: 当 LED 照明产品在 NEECA 涵盖产品范围内时，巴基斯坦要求在产品/包装上显示 NEECA 能效标签（星级式标签），并作为标签计划的一部分向 NEECA 注册/取得型号资格。巴基斯坦并未运行欧盟式 EPREL 公共产品数据库，且 NEECA 标签为星级格式，而非由能效指数（EEI）得出的欧盟重新调整 A–G 等级。巴基斯坦市场没有欧盟式在在线产品列表上显示 A–G 能效标签的法律要求。NEECA 标签内容、星级阈值及注册机制由 NEECA 按涵盖产品类别设定——出货前请确认具体 LED 类别的现行格式、阈值及注册流程。
summary.zht: 當 LED 照明產品在 NEECA 涵蓋產品範圍內時，巴基斯坦要求在產品/包裝上顯示 NEECA 能效標籤（星級式標籤），並作為標籤計劃的一部分向 NEECA 注冊/取得型號資格。巴基斯坦並未運行歐盟式 EPREL 公共產品數據庫，且 NEECA 標籤為星級格式，而非由能效指數（EEI）得出的歐盟重新調整 A–G 等級。巴基斯坦市場沒有歐盟式在在線產品列表上顯示 A–G 能效標籤的法律要求。NEECA 標籤內容、星級閾值及注冊機制由 NEECA 按涵蓋產品類別設定——出貨前請確認具體 LED 類別的現行格式、閾值及注冊流程。

standards_or_laws: NEECA energy-labelling / star-rating programme — label display and model registration for covered products
NEECA Act 2016 — National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority mandate

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for covered LED room luminaires; products must be registered with CQC/CECP before affixing the CEL, which shows Grade 1–3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. The CEL is a grade-based label registered through a CN scheme. There is no mutual recognition between the CN CEL registration and Pakistan's NEECA labelling programme.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对涵盖的 LED 室内照明产品强制实施中国能效标识（CEL）；产品须在贴附 CEL 前向 CQC/CECP 注册，CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1–3 级。CEL 是通过中国方案注册的基于等级的标签。中国 CEL 注册与巴基斯坦 NEECA 标签计划之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對涵蓋的 LED 室內照明產品強制實施中國能效標識（CEL）；產品須在貼附 CEL 前向 CQC/CECP 注冊，CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1–3 級。CEL 是通過中國方案注冊的基於等級的標籤。中國 CEL 注冊與巴基斯坦 NEECA 標籤計劃之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both China (CEL) and Pakistan (NEECA) operate a mandatory energy label for covered products, but the schemes differ and are not mutually recognised: (1) the CN CEL is a Grade 1–3 label registered via CQC/CECP, while the NEECA label is a star-rating format registered with NEECA where the LED category is covered — a CN-registered product must separately qualify and display the NEECA label; (2) Pakistan has no EPREL-style public product database, so there is no EPREL registration step and no EU-style online-listing label-display duty; (3) the NEECA star thresholds use a different scale from CN grades and are not directly cross-mappable. Practical action for the exporter: where the product is within NEECA scope, work through the Pakistan-resident importer to register/qualify the model and apply the correct NEECA label artwork; confirm the current covered-product list, star thresholds and label format, as LED coverage under NEECA has been phasing in.
gap.zh: 中国（CEL）与巴基斯坦（NEECA）均对涵盖产品实施强制能效标签，但方案不同且互不认可：（1）中国 CEL 为经 CQC/CECP 注册的 1–3 级标签，而 NEECA 标签在 LED 类别被涵盖时为向 NEECA 注册的星级格式——中国已注册产品须另行取得资格并显示 NEECA 标签；（2）巴基斯坦无 EPREL 式公共产品数据库，故无 EPREL 注册步骤，亦无欧盟式在线列表标签显示义务；（3）NEECA 星级阈值采用与中国等级不同的标度，不可直接互换。出口商的实际行动：当产品在 NEECA 范围内时，通过巴基斯坦本地进口商注册/取得型号资格并加施正确的 NEECA 标签设计；请确认现行涵盖产品清单、星级阈值及标签格式，因为 NEECA 对 LED 的涵盖正逐步推进。
gap.zht: 中國（CEL）與巴基斯坦（NEECA）均對涵蓋產品實施強制能效標籤，但方案不同且互不認可：（1）中國 CEL 為經 CQC/CECP 注冊的 1–3 級標籤，而 NEECA 標籤在 LED 類別被涵蓋時為向 NEECA 注冊的星級格式——中國已注冊產品須另行取得資格並顯示 NEECA 標籤；（2）巴基斯坦無 EPREL 式公共產品數據庫，故無 EPREL 注冊步驟，亦無歐盟式在線列表標籤顯示義務；（3）NEECA 星級閾值採用與中國等級不同的標度，不可直接互換。出口商的實際行動：當產品在 NEECA 範圍內時，通過巴基斯坦本地進口商注冊/取得型號資格並加施正確的 NEECA 標籤設計；請確認現行涵蓋產品清單、星級閾值及標籤格式，因為 NEECA 對 LED 的涵蓋正逐步推進。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — where the LED category is within NEECA covered-product scope, NEECA energy-label display and model registration/qualification with NEECA are required. No EU-style EPREL database and no EU-style online-listing A–G label duty. Confirm the current NEECA format and process.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: National Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority (NEECA), Pakistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where an LED product is within NEECA's covered-product scope, Pakistan requires display of the NEECA star-rating energy label and model registration with NEECA. There is no EU-style EPREL public database and no online-listing A–G label duty. The CN China Energy Label (Grade 1–3, via CQC/CECP) and the NEECA star-rating label are separate, non-mutual schemes on different scales. Work through the Pakistan-resident importer to qualify the model and apply the correct NEECA label, and confirm the current covered-product list, thresholds and format, as LED coverage has been phasing in.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 当 LED 产品在 NEECA 涵盖产品范围内时，巴基斯坦要求显示 NEECA 星级能效标签并向 NEECA 注册型号。无欧盟式 EPREL 公共数据库，亦无在线列表 A–G 标签义务。中国能效标识（1–3 级，经 CQC/CECP）与 NEECA 星级标签为独立、互不认可且标度不同的方案。请通过巴基斯坦本地进口商取得型号资格并加施正确的 NEECA 标签，并确认现行涵盖产品清单、阈值及格式，因为 LED 涵盖正逐步推进。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 當 LED 產品在 NEECA 涵蓋產品範圍內時，巴基斯坦要求顯示 NEECA 星級能效標籤並向 NEECA 注冊型號。無歐盟式 EPREL 公共數據庫，亦無在線列表 A–G 標籤義務。中國能效標識（1–3 級，經 CQC/CECP）與 NEECA 星級標籤為獨立、互不認可且標度不同的方案。請通過巴基斯坦本地進口商取得型號資格並加施正確的 NEECA 標籤，並確認現行涵蓋產品清單、閾值及格式，因為 LED 涵蓋正逐步推進。
